name: Chicken and Dumplings.
recipeInstructions:
Saute onions in chicken broth until tender, add flour, salt, and pepper.
Cook until bubbly. Add 2 cups of milk. Mix into white sauce with chicken, vegetables, and cheese.
Pour mixture into 2 casserole pans. Make dumplings: Stir together dry ingredients, cut in shortening, add milk. Drop by tablespoonfuls onto chicken mixture.
Freeze. It freezes nicely
To Cook: Thaw completely. Bake at 350°F for about an hour or until hot and biscuits are done.
